summary: Team Announcements feature fully tested. All backend CRUD endpoints working (20/20 tests passed). Frontend admin page and welcome dashboard both functional. Admin can create, edit, pin, toggle visibility, and delete announcements. HR and other roles can see announcements on welcome dashboard but cannot access admin CRUD page.

backend_get_active_announcements.detail: GET /api/team/announcements returns active announcements sorted by pinned first

backend_get_all_announcements_admin.detail: GET /api/team/announcements/all returns ALL announcements for admin only

backend_get_all_forbidden_non_admin.detail: GET /api/team/announcements/all returns 403 for HR and unauthenticated users

backend_create_announcement.detail: POST /api/team/announcements creates announcement (admin only), 403 for non-admin

frontend_admin_announcements_sidebar.detail: Admin sidebar shows 'Announcements' link, navigates to /team/admin/announcements

frontend_admin_announcements_page.detail: Admin announcements page lists all announcements with type badges, pin indicators, action buttons

frontend_new_announcement_form.detail: Clicking 'New Announcement' shows form with title, body, type selector, pin toggle, expiry date

frontend_create_announcement.detail: Creating announcement adds it to list with toast notification

frontend_toggle_announcement_visibility.detail: Toggle active/hidden works - hidden announcements show 'Hidden' badge and are not visible on welcome dashboard

frontend_delete_announcement.detail: Delete works with confirm dialog, removes announcement from list

frontend_welcome_dashboard_announcements.detail: Welcome dashboard /team/dashboard shows announcements section with color-coded cards (info=blue, warning=amber)

frontend_hr_sees_announcements.detail: HR user sees all active announcements on welcome dashboard

frontend_hr_cannot_access_admin.detail: HR trying to access /team/admin/announcements is redirected to /team/dashboard

frontend_pinned_sorting.detail: Pinned announcements appear first in both admin list and welcome dashboard

seed_data_creation: Test created 'TEST_PlaywrightAnnouncement' during testing and deleted it after. Original seed announcements intact: 'Q1 Targets Released' (info, pinned) and 'System Maintenance' (warning).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team Announcements feature is fully working. Backend endpoints: GET /api/team/announcements (public active), GET /api/team/announcements/all (admin), POST/PUT/DELETE (admin). Frontend: Admin CRUD at /team/admin/announcements, welcome dashboard shows announcements. data-testid attributes: admin-announcements-page, announcements-list, new-announcement-btn, announcement-form, announcement-title-input, announcement-body-input, announcement-save-btn, type-{info|success|warning|urgent}, announcement-pin-toggle, toggle-active-{id}, delete-{id}, announcements-section, welcome-announcement-{index}.
